lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: Would you like to buy some crafting equipment?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks; I've got all the Crafting equipment I need.

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: Okay. Fare well on your travels.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you know about Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: I know that one of his thugs has threatened to ruin my store if I don't cooperate with them!

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: He said he was a tailor, but those scissors looked more like a weapon than something used for Crafting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going to do, then?

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: As long as I have my store, I'll keep selling my Crafting equipment! Would you like to buy any?

sections.title: Using an Al kharid flyer on Dommik

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! I have this money-off voucher!

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: So I see! Unfortunately, it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I only just got it!

lines.speaker: Dommik
lines.text: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
